creator: crtmike@gmx.us
text:
Since Fcitx 4.0, Fcitx is not only a Chinese input method 
but a flexible and beautiful input method framework. 

It now supports a number of input methods, not only Chinese,
but English, Japanese, Korean and so on. See the project page: https://github.com/fcitx/.

So Fcitx should be in 'textproc' like iBus and SCIM, instead of
'chinese'.

Fix: 

Place fcitx in 'textproc'.
How-To-Repeat: 

psearch fcitx
OR
make search name=fcitx
